name: apiprox
description: HTTP/HTTPS Proxy and Mock Server for API Testing

scripts.tauri:dev: node scripts/version.js increment && node scripts/version.js sync && cd src-tauri/webview && npm install && cd ../.. && npx tauri dev
scripts.tauri:test: cd src-tauri/webview && npm install && cd ../.. && npx tauri dev
scripts.tauri:update: git submodule update --init --recursive && cd vendor/APInox/packages/request-editor && npm install && npm run build && cd ../../../.. && cd src-tauri/webview && npm install && cd ../.. && cargo fetch --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
